name: Energous Corp
summary: PARTI Overview We have developed scalable, over-the-air Wireless Power Network (WPN) technology that integrates advanced semiconductor chipsets, software controls, hardware designs, and antenna systems to enable radio frequency (RF)-based charging for ambient Internet of Things (IoT) devices, transforming supply chain capabilities from limited tracking to overall business intelligence.
